steps.title: Solve the equation
steps.content: Add $|x-9|$ to both sides: $2|x-9|=24$, so $|x-9|=12$. This gives $x=21$ or $x=-3$.

steps.title: Sum the solutions
steps.content:
Add: $21+(-3)=18$. (Or use the shortcut: solutions of $|x-a|=b$ sum to $2a=18$.)

The answer is 18.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $18$; substituting or interpreting it in the original condition satisfies the requirement, so $18$ is the value to enter.
